# Aurelis Ingredients

> Aurelis Ingredients is a botanical ingredient sourcing desk helping global supplement, wellness and cosmetic brands source, verify and manage botanical ingredients from India.

## Primary URL
https://aurelisingredients.com/

## What Aurelis does
Aurelis helps procurement managers, ingredient buyers, product development teams and brand founders with supplier discovery, supplier screening, sample coordination, documentation coordination and sourcing communication for Indian botanical ingredients.

## Key ingredient categories
- Ashwagandha root, powder and extracts
- Turmeric powder and turmeric extracts
- Moringa leaf powder and related ingredients
- Tulsi leaf, powder and extracts
- Herbal extracts
- Botanical powders
- Essential oils

## Target buyers
- Supplement brands
- Nutraceutical companies
- Wellness brands
- Cosmetic and personal care brands
- Private-label manufacturers
- Ingredient distributors
- Procurement managers and sourcing directors

## Core markets served
United States, European Union, United Kingdom, United Arab Emirates, Australia, South Korea and Japan.

## Buyer actions
- Request samples
- Submit ingredient specifications
- Share required active level, form, market, volume, certifications and documentation needs
- Book a sourcing discussion if the requirement fits the supplier network

## Positioning summary
Aurelis is not a generic export brochure. It is positioned as a procurement-friendly sourcing desk for verified botanical ingredients from India, focused on consistency, documentation, supplier screening and responsive coordination.

## Important caveat
Website content is marketing and sourcing information. It should not be interpreted as medical advice, regulatory advice, certification proof or guarantee of product availability. Buyers should verify specifications, certifications and compliance for their target market before placing orders.
